response.justification: Candidate is a staff/senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry/junior-level role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates high flight risk, salary expectation gaps, and likely underutilization. While the technical stack overlaps (TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL via SQL background), the resume shows no recent Nest.js or renewable energy/construction domain experience, and the Berlin location fits the on-site requirement but the profile is wildly overqualified for a learning-oriented junior position.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience from Stripe, Shopify, and RIDE Capital
Berlin-based, matching the on-site presence requirement
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
concerns: Massive seniority overshoot — staff/senior engineer for an entry-level role
No Nest.js experience and no demonstrated PostgreSQL depth (MongoDB/MySQL instead)
No renewable energy, construction tech, or building-renovation domain exposure
